text.label: Text / Prose
text.description: Freeform content with markdown formatting. Good for tips, lore, introductions, and walkthroughs.

fields.label: Tip box (optional)
fields.hint: Appears as a highlighted callout above the main text.

keyvalue.label: Key / Value
keyvalue.description: Two-column reference list. Best for stats, settings, quick facts, and controls.

fields.label: Rows
fields.hint: Each row is a key-value pair. Values support **bold** and *italic*.

checklist.label: Checklist
checklist.description: Trackable item list. Each user's progress is saved in their browser.

fields.label: Extra Columns
fields.hint: The Name column is always included. Add optional extra columns (e.g. Price, Season, Note).

fields.label: Items
fields.hint: Each item can have a Name, an optional sub-note, and values for any extra columns.

table.label: Table
table.description: Reference table with user-defined columns. Good for stat comparisons, item data, and schedules.

fields.label: Columns
fields.hint: Define the column headers. Column order here matches display order.

cards.label: Cards
cards.description: Repeated rich entries. Good for characters, items, enemies, locations, recipes — anything with a name and multiple attributes.

fields.label: Card Fields
fields.hint: Define the fields each card has. The first field becomes the card's title/name.
